label.description: The field label displayed in the edit screen

type.description: Field type identifier. Must be "range" for this field type.

name.description: The field name used to save/load data. Auto-generated from label if not provided.

key.description: Unique field key. Auto-generated if not provided.

instructions.description: Instructions displayed to editors below the field label

conditional_logic.description: Conditional logic rules. Set to false to disable, or provide rules array.

default_value.description: Default numerical value for the range field when creating new content

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in empty fields

prepend.description: Text or character to display before the range input (e.g., "$" for currency)

append.description: Text or character to display after the range input (e.g., "%" for percentage)

allow_in_bindings.description: Whether this field can be used in block bindings

min.description: Minimum allowed value for the range slider

max.description: Maximum allowed value for the range slider

step.description: Step size for the range slider (controls increment/decrement granularity)
